description:
Tiflotecnia voices for NVDA
NVDA driver to the Cerence Embedded TTS synth
License required to use the voices.
changelog:
Set compatibility with NVDA 2026.1
Change for 64-bit.
Allows usage in NVDA 32 and 64-bit versions.
